market_regime.interpretation: Put walls are temporary support (breakdown likely). Call walls are strong resistance. Gamma flip acts as dynamic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to positive GEX across all expiries. Dealers long gamma will contain moves. Range-bound behavior expected until a catalyst breaks the 655 pivot.
outlook.summary: Spot (655.83) sits precisely at the RESONANCE level where 0DTE and Weekly gamma flips converge. Positive GEX (9.73B total) indicates dealer hedging will suppress volatility. Extreme PCR (4.01 monthly) suggests crowded bearish positioning - potential for short squeeze above 660. Max Pain progression (650→655→664) shows upward dealer targets. Bearish 0DTE skew (1.31) contrasts with neutral longer-term skew, indicating short-term fear but structural stability.

levels.motivazione: CRITICAL: Gamma flip in both 0DTE (655.0) and WEEKLY (655.0) expiries. Spot at 655.83 testing this level. Dealer hedging pivot point - determines intraday direction. Weekly Max Pain alignment adds magnetic pull.
MAJOR SUPPORT: 85,068 OI (WEEKLY) + 98,732 OI (MONTHLY) = 183,800 total Put OI. High Volume ratio (72K/79K) confirms active defense. Second largest Put concentration in structure.
FLOOR: Largest Put OI concentration - 107,076 (WEEKLY) + 126,341 (MONTHLY) = 233,417 total. Ultimate structural support. Unlikely to breach without major catalyst.
Dealer target for MONTHLY expiry. Spot needs +1.25% to reach. Positive GEX suggests slow grind toward this level. Upper bound of expected range.
Resistance: 12,975 OI (0DTE) + 670 CALL 12,162 OI (0DTE). Primary cap for intraday moves. Volume surge (28K/38K) indicates active trading at this level.
Support cluster: 34,832 OI (0DTE) + 9,694 OI (WEEKLY) + 38,402 OI (MONTHLY). First support below gamma flip. High activity confirms relevance.
Intraday dealer target. Below spot (-0.89%). Magnetic pull may draw price lower in positive GEX environment. 26,693 Put OI adds support confluence.
Monthly resistance ceiling: 34,559 CALL OI. Significant but distant (+4.4%). Upside target in bullish scenario.
